title: Isolate cached PowerShell module state between tests
prompt: The ProfileCache test suite passes when its cases are run separately, but fails when the full file runs in one PowerShell session. Repair the shared module-test bootstrap so every test case receives a newly imported ProfileCache module before its case-specific Pester mock is installed. Preserve the helper's Path/Name interface and global command visibility. Keep cache behavior within a single case and the module's exported commands unchanged. Do not modify the protected tests. Verification is offline and deterministic; run `python3 -B tests/verify.py` from the repository root.
